home.title: DarkTunes Charts
home.subtitle: The fairest dark music charts in the world
home.description: Powered by mathematically proven voting algorithms that eliminate strategic manipulation.

charts.title: Charts
charts.description: Aggregated results from fan voting, DJ ballots, and peer reviews

fanVote.title: Fan Vote
fanVote.description: Quadratic Voting — 100 Voice Credits per month
fanVote.helpText: The more votes you concentrate on ONE track, the more expensive it becomes (cost = votes²).
fanVote.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit these votes?

djVote.title: DJ Ballot
djVote.dragToRank: Drag tracks into your preferred order
djVote.helpText: The Beatpath algorithm finds the Condorcet winner — strategic burial is mathematically impossible.

peerVote.title: Band Peer Review
peerVote.helpText: Voting rings are penalised by clique detection.

qv.title: Quadratic Voting (QV)
qv.summary: The more votes you concentrate on ONE track, the more expensive it becomes.

schulze.title: Schulze Method (Beatpath)
schulze.summary: DJs submit a ranked list. The Condorcet winner wins.

peer.title: Peer Voting (Anti-Collusion)
peer.summary: Bands rate each other, voting rings are penalised.
